authoritative_decisions.decision: The durable workflow record remains execution authority.
authoritative_decisions.rationale: prevents governance projection from claiming live pause state without runner proof.

authoritative_decisions.decision: Pause-related state is projection-only in Increment Two A.
authoritative_decisions.rationale: keeps the increment additive and backward compatible.

authoritative_decisions.decision: Existing workers remain unaware of and unaffected by the projection.
authoritative_decisions.rationale: avoids changing execution behavior before a runner protocol exists.
prevents silent destructive synchronization at boot.
keeps permission mutations auditable and bounded.

authoritative_decisions.decision: No public mutation route is introduced.
authoritative_decisions.rationale: all operational commands must remain refusal-only.
preserves Increment One command ledger contract.

non_goals.authorization_required: separate explicit approval for live pause behavior.
non_goals.future_prerequisite: Increment Two B/C and a future authenticated runner acknowledgement protocol.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: operators could trigger a real pause path with no end-to-end proof.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: would expose live pause behavior before the runner protocol and authoritative state model are complete.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: runner acknowledgement protocol and integration tests.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: could mutate execution without governing audit boundaries.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: runner changes belong to the next increment once the projection is stable.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: approved runner protocol plus durable workflow coordination.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: false-positive paused states or stalled workflows.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: checkpoint semantics require the runner and workflow engine to agree on pause authority.

non_goals.authorization_required: new scope approval on the workflow engine.
non_goals.future_prerequisite: validated projection and explicit follow-on workflow increment.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: could break current starts, status, resume, history, cancel, compensation, or recovery behavior.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: the durable engine must remain unchanged while governance is added alongside it.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: live pause implementation and runner acknowledgement.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: would create an incomplete pause/resume control plane.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: resume semantics are not part of the prerequisite governance layer.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: approved live pause increment and visual baseline review.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: could mislead operators into believing pause is ready.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: the UI must remain disabled until live operational behavior is authorized.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: explicit API design and security review for live pause.
non_goals.non_goal: add new public operational mutation endpoints
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: unauthorized live actions could become reachable.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: new mutation surfaces would bypass the refusal-only guard.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: new approved visual baseline and audit cycle.
non_goals.non_goal: alter Phase One visuals or Operations Floor
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: visual baseline must remain frozen while closure evidence is assembled.

non_goals.non_goal: modify Increment One command hash formulas
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: would invalidate command-event evidence and refusals.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: command ledger integrity depends on stable hashing.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: separate recovery branch or explicit user direction.
non_goals.non_goal: restore unrelated Pixel Office or stashed work
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: would broaden the diff and obscure evidence provenance.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: must not contaminate the Mission Control closure branch.

non_goals.authorization_required: new prompt authorizing the next increment.
non_goals.future_prerequisite: Increment Two A closure and new authorization.
non_goals.non_goal: begin Increment Two B or C
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: could drift into live pause delivery before prerequisites pass.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: only the prerequisite increment is authorized.

non_goals.future_prerequisite: draft PR review and explicit merge approval.
non_goals.risk_if_included_now: would hide unresolved evidence or regressions.
non_goals.why_not_wider_scope: branch must remain draft until review and CI are complete.
